title: A New Friend
theme: making a new friend at school

sentences.text: It is a warm morning, and Tom walks to school.
sentences.gloss: 这是一个温暖的早晨，汤姆走路去学校。

sentences.text: A new boy stands near the door.
sentences.gloss: 一个新来的男孩站在门边。

sentences.text: Tom looks at him and says his name.
sentences.gloss: 汤姆看着他，说出自己的名字。

sentences.text: The boy is Sam, and he has no friends here.
sentences.gloss: 这个男孩叫萨姆，他在这里还没有朋友。

sentences.text: Tom gives Sam a book and asks him to play.
sentences.gloss: 汤姆给萨姆一本书，请他一起玩。

sentences.text: After class they run and jump near a big tree.
sentences.gloss: 下课后，他们在一棵大树旁边跑跑跳跳。

sentences.text: A bird sings in the sun, and a dog plays with them.
sentences.gloss: 一只鸟在阳光下鸣叫，一只狗和他们一起玩。

sentences.text: Now Sam is happy, and he is not sad.
sentences.gloss: 现在萨姆很高兴，不再伤心了。
